features: GENTLE POWDER FOR NEWBORN SKIN: Johnson’s Baby Powder is specially formulated for delicate newborn and baby skin, helping to reduce friction, soothe irritation, and keep skin dry and soft all day.
CLINICALLY PROVEN SAFE AND HYPOALLERGENIC: This baby talc is dermatologically tested, hypoallergenic, and clinically proven mild, making it ideal for daily use on sensitive infant and toddler skin.

ABSORBS MOISTURE TO KEEP BABY COMFORTABLE: The fine talc powder helps absorb excess moisture after bathing or diaper changes, preventing chafing and keeping your baby’s skin fresh, smooth, and comfortable.

MULTIPACK VALUE FOR DAILY BABY CARE ROUTINE: Includes two 200g bottles of Johnson’s Baby Powder for consistent use at home or on the go, making it a must-have item in your baby essentials and changing bag.

TRUSTED BY PARENTS FOR GENERATIONS: Johnson’s is a trusted brand in baby skincare, and this baby powder offers reliable performance to protect your baby’s skin with a soft, comforting scent after every use.
description: Product description Johnson’s Baby Powder 2 x 200g is a trusted baby care essential designed to gently protect delicate baby skin. This clinically proven powder is specially formulated to keep your baby’s skin soft, smooth, and dry. Ideal for newborns, infants, and toddlers, the gentle formula helps reduce friction, absorb excess moisture, and prevent irritation during daily routines like diaper changes or after bathing. This baby powder is hypoallergenic and dermatologically tested, ensuring it’s safe for sensitive skin. Johnson’s Baby Talcum Powder glides on easily and creates a barrier that helps maintain your baby’s skin’s natural softness. With a light, comforting scent, it leaves skin smelling fresh and feeling silky smooth. This Product comes with an APHY ENTERPRISES GUIDE TO USE! This convenient multipack includes 2 x 200g bottles, perfect for keeping one at home and one in your changing bag. Whether you're using it after a bath or before bedtime, Johnson’s Baby Powder is an essential part of your baby skincare routine. Trusted by parents for generations, it provides the gentle care your baby needs every day. Directions Apply to baby's skin after bath or before bedtime. Use daily. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Avoid use near face to prevent inhalation. See more
